title: Iraq accuses U.S. of killing 7 soldiers in clinic strike
summary_full: As Iraq claimed “heinous aggression,” the U.S. denied it targeted a clinic. The incident threatens to sour relations between the countries amid the Iran war.
summary_public: As Iraq claimed “heinous aggression,” the U.S. denied it targeted a clinic. The incident threatens to sour relations between the countries amid the Iran war.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: The incident threatens to sour relations between the countries amid the Iran war.
